text.div:
Generated Narrative: ImplementationGuide hl7.cql

CQL

The official URL for this implementation guide is: 

http://cql.hl7.org/ImplementationGuide/hl7.cql

extension.valueMarkdown: Automatically added as a dependency - all IGs depend on HL7 Terminology
Automatically added as a dependency - all IGs depend on the HL7 Extension Pack

resource.name: FHIRPath Grammar File (G4)
resource.description: The ANTLR4 grammar file for the FHIRPath grammar

resource.name: ELM Schema - ClinicalExpression
resource.description: The ClincalExpression ELM Schema, which extends the Expression schema, adding clinically focused constructs such as Retrieve and Terminology capabilities.

resource.name: ELM Schema - CQLAnnotations
resource.description: The CQLAnnotations ELM Schema, which extends the base schemas, adding support for annotations.

resource.name: ELM Schema - Expression
resource.description: The base Expression ELM Schema, containing the core expression language and operations.

resource.name: ELM Schema - Library
resource.description: The Library ELM Schema, which defines the Library container for ELM.

resource.name: ModelInfo Schema
resource.description: The ModelInfo Schema, which defines a possible representation for Model Information usable by a CQL translator.

resource.name: Test Schema
resource.description: The Test Schema, shared with the FHIRPath specification, which defines a simple format for self-contained language tests.

resource.name: ELM Schema - Types
resource.description: The ELM Types Schema, which defines the system-defined types used to represent type information in ELM.
